'''Achi Shrine''' (阿智神社, あちじんじゃ)
* {{ill|Achi Shrine (Achi Village)|ja|阿智神社 (阿智村)}} - Located in {{ill|Achi, Nagano|ja|阿智村}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|ja|下伊那郡}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}. A {{ill|Shinano Province|ja|信濃国}} {{ill|Engishiki shrine|ja|延喜式内社}}. * {{ill|Achi Shrine (Kurashiki)|ja|阿智神社 (倉敷市)}} - Located in {{ill|Kurashiki, Okayama|ja|倉敷市}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|ja|岡山県}}, Honmachi. The general guardian shrine of Kurashiki.
